post.description: Method to get site usage/summary.

Validates SQL inventory data for format and correctness before attempting import. This is a safer alternative to direct import as it prevents failed imports due to invalid data. The operation performs validation checks first and only proceeds with import if all checks pass.

Application.description: Application in the guest virtual machine.

name.description: Gets or sets Name of the Application.

version.description: Gets or sets Version of the Application.

provider.description: Gets or sets Provider of the Application.

ApplicationDiscovery.description: Contains data related application and roles discovery scope.

hydratedRunAsAccountId.description:
Gets the run as account ID with which feature worked successfully.
           
It is discovered by the agent from the list of credentials.

AppsAndRoles.description: AppsAndRoles in the guest virtual machine.

applications.description: Gets or sets Applications of the AppsAndRoles.

webApplications.description: Gets or sets WebApplications of the AppsAndRoles.

features.description: Gets or sets Features of the AppsAndRoles.

sqlServers.description: Gets or sets SQLServers of the AppsAndRoles.

sharePointServers.description: Gets or sets SharePointServers of the AppsAndRoles.

systemCenters.description: Gets or sets SystemCenters of the AppsAndRoles.

bizTalkServers.description: Gets or sets BizTalkServers of the AppsAndRoles.

exchangeServers.description: Gets or sets ExchangeServers of the AppsAndRoles.

otherDatabases.description: Gets or sets OtherDatabaseServers of the AppsAndRoles.

ArcDiscovery.description: Contains data related to Azure arc discovery.

machineResourceId.description: A type definition that refers the id to an ARM resource.

locations.description: Locations to discover Arc resources from.

subscriptionOrResourceGroupIds.description: List of subscription or resource group ARM IDs. Allowed only if scopeType is SubscriptionOrResourceGroupIds.

lastSuccessfulSyncTime.description: Gets the last successful sync time of arc site in UTC.

locations.description: Locations to discover Arc resources from.

subscriptionOrResourceGroupIds.description: List of subscription or resource group ARM IDs. Allowed only if scopeType is SubscriptionOrResourceGroupIds.

items.description: An array of ARM resource IDs for subscriptions or resource groups.

BizTalkServer.description: BizTalkServer in the guest virtual machine.

productName.description: Gets or sets ProductName of the BizTalkServer.

status.description: Gets or sets Status of the BizTalkServer.

ConnectorUnit.description: The connectors of the web server.

bindings.description: Gets or sets the bindings for the connector.

DeleteImportMachinesJob.description: A host resource belonging to a site resource.

properties.description: The resource-specific properties for this resource.

status.description: Gets or sets the Job status.

startTime.description: Gets or sets the Job start time.

endTime.description: Gets or sets the Job end time.

displayName.description: Gets or sets the Display name.

provisioningState.description: The status of the current operation.

DependencyMapDiscovery.description: Contains data related dependency map discovery scope.

hydratedRunAsAccountId.description:
Gets the run as account ID with which feature worked successfully.
           
It is discovered by the agent from the list of credentials.

machineId.description: Gets or sets the ARM id of the machine.

isDependencyMapToBeEnabled.description:
Gets or sets a value indicating whether
            dependency mapping is to
be enabled or not.

DependencyMapServiceMapextensionsClientG.description: DependencyMap ServiceMap extensions Client GroupMembers Request

DependencyMapServiceMapextensionsDepende.description: DependencyMap Service Map extensions Dependency Map Request Filters

DependencyMapServiceMapextensionsServerG.description: DependencyMap ServiceMap extensions ServerGroup Members Request

DependencyMapServiceMapextensionsSingleM.description: DependencyMap ServiceMap extensions SingleMachine DetailedMap Request

DirectoryPath.description: Second level entity for virtual directories.

virtual.description: Gets or sets the virtual path for the directory.

physical.description: Gets or sets the physical path of the directory on the web server.

affectedResourceType.description: Gets or sets the affected resource type.

DiscoverySiteDataSource.description: Web app data source web model.

properties.description: The resource-specific properties for this resource.

DiscoverySiteDataSourceProperties.description: Discovery site data source properties class.

discoverySiteId.description: Gets or sets the discovery site Id.

provisioningState.description: The status of the current operation.

ErrorDetails.description: Error contract returned when some exception occurs in Rest API.

possibleCauses.description: Gets the possible causes of error.

recommendedAction.description: Gets the recommended action to resolve error.

isAgentReportedError.description: Gets a value indicating whether the error originated from a agent or not.

agentErrorMessage.description: Gets the error message from the agent.

agentErrorPossibleCauses.description: Gets possible causes for the agent error.

agentErrorRecommendedAction.description: Gets the recommended action for the agent error.

applianceName.description: Gets or sets the Appliance Name.

Errors.description: The properties of a server machine tracked resource

possibleCauses.description: Gets the possible causes of error.

recommendedAction.description: Gets the recommended action to resolve error.

updatedTimeStamp.description: Gets the time stamp when the error was updated.

runAsAccountId.description: Gets run as account id used while performing discovery             of entity.

discoveryScope.description: Gets discovery scope for which             error is encountered.

ExchangeServer.description: ExchangeServer in the guest virtual machine.

productName.description: Gets or sets ProductName of the ExchangeServer.

edition.description: Gets or sets Edition of the ExchangeServer.

roles.description: Gets or sets Roles of the ExchangeServer.

servicePack.description: Gets or sets ServicePack of the ExchangeServer.

version.description: Gets or sets Version of the ExchangeServer.

properties.description: Gets or sets the export machines job properties.

id.description: Gets or sets the relative ARM name to get job.

name.description: Gets or sets the Job ID.

status.description: Gets or sets the Job status.

startTime.description: Gets or sets the Job start time.

endTime.description: Gets or sets the Job end time.

displayName.description: Gets or sets the Display name.

ExportMachineErrorsRequest.description: The body of export machine errors request.

properties.description: Gets or sets the properties.

applianceName.description: Gets or sets the Appliance Name.

Feature.description: Feature in the guest virtual machine.

name.description: Gets or sets Name of the Feature.

featureType.description: Gets or sets FeatureType of the Feature.

parent.description: Gets or sets Parent of the Feature.

status.description: Gets or sets Status of the Feature.

logicalName.description: Gets or sets the logical name of the file.

physicalFullName.description: Gets or sets the operating-system full path of the file.

sizeInMb.description: Gets or sets the size of the file in MB.

isMemoryOptimizedDataOptionEnabled.description: Gets or sets a value indicating whether memory optimized data option is enabled.

FrontEndBinding.description: Frontend bindings for a web application.

protocol.description: Gets or sets the Binding protocol.

hostName.description: Gets or sets the Host name.

port.description: Gets or sets the Port number.

ipAddress.description: Gets or sets the IP Address.

GenericArcDiscovery.description: Contains data related to Azure Generic Arc Discovery.

GuestOsDetails.description: Second level object.  Data related to a machine's operating system.             Serialized and stored as part of Machine Rest object.

osType.description: Gets or sets the type of the operating system.

osName.description: Gets or sets the Name of the operating system.

osVersion.description: Gets or sets the Version of the operating system.

osArchitecture.description: Gets or sets the Architecture of the operating system.

osDistro.description: Gets or sets the Distro of the operating system.

osMajorVersion.description: Gets or sets the Major Version of the operating system.

osVariant.description: Gets or sets the Variant of the operating system.

kernelVersion.description: Gets or sets the Kernel Version of the operating system.

HealthErrorDetails.description: Error contract returned when some exception occurs in Rest API.

possibleCauses.description: Gets the possible causes of error.

recommendedAction.description: Gets the recommended action to resolve error.

updatedTimeStamp.description: Gets the time stamp when the error was updated.

runAsAccountId.description: Gets run as account id used while performing discovery             of entity.

discoveryScope.description: Gets discovery scope for which             error is encountered.

HypervCluster.description: A cluster resource belonging to a site resource.

properties.description: The resource-specific properties for this resource.

createdTimestamp.description: Gets the timestamp marking Hyper-V cluster creation.

updatedTimestamp.description: Gets the timestamp marking last updated on the Hyper-V cluster.

fqdn.description: Gets or sets the FQDN/IPAddress of the Hyper-V cluster.

functionalLevel.description: Gets the functional level of the Hyper-V cluster.

status.description: Gets the status of the Hyper-V cluster.

runAsAccountId.description: Gets or sets Run as account ID of the Hyper-V cluster.

hostFqdnList.description: Gets or sets list of hosts (FQDN) currently being tracked by the cluster.

provisioningState.description: The status of the current operation.

HypervDisk.description: Second level object returned as part of Machine REST resource.

maxSizeInBytes.description: Gets or sets Bytes allocated for the disk.

name.description: Gets or sets Name of the disk.

diskType.description: Gets or sets Type of the disk.

lun.description: Gets or sets LUN of the disk.

isOSDisk.description: Gets or sets a value indicating whether disk is os disk.

path.description: Gets or sets Path of the disk.

HypervHost.description: A host resource belonging to a site resource.

properties.description: The resource-specific properties for this resource.

createdTimestamp.description: Gets the timestamp marking Hyper-V host creation.

updatedTimestamp.description: Gets the timestamp marking last updated on the Hyper-V host.

fqdn.description: Gets or sets the FQDN/IPAddress of the Hyper-V host.

runAsAccountId.description: Gets or sets the run as account ID of the Hyper-V host.

version.description: Gets the version of the Hyper-V host.

provisioningState.description: The status of the current operation.

HypervJob.description: A job resource belonging to a site resource.

properties.description: The resource-specific properties for this resource.

HypervMachine.description: A machine resource belonging to a site resource.

properties.description: The resource-specific properties for this resource.

instanceUuid.description: On-premise Instance UUID of the machine.

highAvailability.description: Value indicating whether the VM is highly available

maxMemoryMb.description: Max memory of the virtual machine in MB.

isDynamicMemoryEnabled.description: Value indicating whether dynamic memory is enabled for the VM.

networkAdapters.description: Network adapters attached to the machine.

secureBootTemplateId.description: Gets or sets the SecureBootTemplateId setting of the VM.

secureBootEnabled.description: Gets or sets a value indicating whether Secure boot is enabled for the VM.

secureBootTemplate.description: Gets or sets the SecureBootTemplateId setting of the VM.

tpmEnabled.description:
Gets or sets a value indicating whether trusted platform module is enabled on
the VM.

ksdEnabled.description: Gets or sets a value indicating whether key storage device is enabled on the VM.

shieldingRequested.description: Gets or sets a value indicating whether shielding is enabled for the VM.

dataProtectionRequested.description: Gets or sets a value indicating whether data protection is requested for a VM.

encryptStateAndVmMigrationTraffic.description:
Gets or sets a value indicating whether encryption of state and migration
traffic is enabled for the VM.

virtualizationBasedSecurityOptOut.description:
Gets or sets a value indicating whether VM virtualization based security is
enabled for the VM.

vmConfigurationFileLocation.description: Gets the Root location of the VM configuration file.

guestOsDetails.description: Operating System Details extracted from the guest             bu executing script inside the guest VM.

numberOfApplications.description: Number of applications installed in the guest VM.

numberOfSoftware.description: Number of software installed in the guest VM.

numberOfSecurityRisks.description: Number of security risks identified on the guest VM.

guestDetailsDiscoveryTimestamp.description:
The last time at which the Guest Details was discovered
            or the
error while discovering guest details based discovery

machine.

isGuestDetailsDiscoveryInProgress.description:
Whether Refresh Fabric Layout Guest Details has been completed once.
         
  Portal will show discovery in progress, if this value is true.

dependencyMapping.description:
Gets or sets if dependency mapping feature is enabled or not
            for
the VM.

dependencyMappingStartTime.description: Gets or sets when dependency mapping collection is last started.

dependencyMappingEndTime.description: Gets or sets when dependency mapping collection was last disabled.

Gets the parent availability replica overview if any.
            This would be
set with details of parent AG and AR for cases where this availability group is
a part of a distributed AG.
            Currently, we do not populate this
since discovery and linking of DAG(Distributed Availability Group) is not
implemented.

Gets or sets a value indicating whether this Availability group is part of a
distributed AG.

Gets or sets the Availability Group Id in which this database participates if
any. It would be set if the database has

This is null in case Replica is
            of type AG. This is to be populated
in case of normal AG.

Gets or sets the Availability Replica object if Replica is of type AG. This is
null in case Replica is

in case AG is of type DAG.

VmwareDisk.description: Second level object returned as part of Machine REST resource.

diskProvisioningPolicy.description:
The provisioning policy of the disk.
            It is Thin or Thick or
Unknown for the VMWare VMDK.

diskScrubbingPolicy.description:
The scrubbing policy of disks which can be
            eagerly zeroed or
lazily zeroed.

diskMode.description: Disk mode property used for identifying independent disks.

controllerType.description: Gets or sets a value indicating the type of the disk controller type.

maxSizeInBytes.description: Gets or sets Bytes allocated for the disk.

name.description: Gets or sets Name of the disk.

diskType.description: Gets or sets Type of the disk.

lun.description: Gets or sets LUN of the disk.

isOSDisk.description: Gets or sets a value indicating whether disk is os disk.

path.description: Gets or sets Path of the disk.

uuid.description: Gets the instance UUID of the vmware host.

instanceUuid.description: On-premise Instance UUID of the machine.

hostInMaintenanceMode.description: Indicates whether the host is in maintenance mode.

changeTrackingEnabled.description: Value indicating whether change tracking is enabled.

secureBootEnabled.description: Gets or sets a value indicating whether Secure boot is enabled for the VM.

maxSnapshots.description: Maximum number of snapshots for the VM.            Default value is -1.

diskEnabledUuid.description: Gets or sets whether Disk Enabled UUID is set or not.

numberOfSnapshots.description: Number of snapshots for the VM.             Default value is -1.

altGuestName.description: Gets or sets the machine alt guest name.

vmConfigurationFileLocation.description: Gets the Root location of the VM configuration file.

            bu executing
script inside the guest VM.

numberOfSecurityRisks.description: Number of security risks identified on the guest VM.

The last time at which the Guest Details was discovered
            or the
error while discovering guest details based discovery
            of the
machine.

isGuestDetailsDiscoveryInProgress.description:
Whether Refresh Fabric Layout Guest Details has been completed once.
         
  Portal will show discovery in progress, if this value is true.

eTag.description: If eTag is provided in the response body, it may also be provided as a header per the normal etag convention.  Entity tags are used for comparing two or more entities from the same requested resource. HTTP/1.1 uses entity tags in the etag (section 14.19), If-Match (section 14.24), If-None-Match (section 14.26), and If-Range (section 14.27) header fields.
